content:
Conclusion:
Over 60 gold and copper mineral occurrences have been recorded within the Coe district and within Fairbairn
Goldfield’s tenure, illustrated in Figure 1. A significant number of these are located on or close to north to north
easterly trending structures. With significant structures striking through Fairbairn Goldfield’s tenements, their
prospectivity must be considered very high.
 
Within the tenements covered by this report, RC Drilling is recommended at Emily Wells, Antipodean, Maralinga Downs
and Warribrook.
 
Auger sampling, which is amenable to the shallow regolith, has identified new drilling targets and should be
applied in a regional and systematic fashion throughout the tenement package.
